## Definisi Dasar Qubit

:::: {.columns style="display: flex; gap: 4%; margin-top: 1.5em; text-align: left;"}

::: {.column width="50%"}

Istilah *Quantum Bit* berasal dari gabungan kata 
[**Quantum**]{.fragment .highlight-blue fragment-index=2} dan 
[**Bit**]{.fragment .highlight-red fragment-index=1}.

<div class="table-center">
<table class="my-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; border-bottom: 2px solid #cbd5e1; text-align: center; background-color: #e2e8f0; color: #1e293b; font-weight: 600;">
        <span class="fragment highlight-red" data-fragment-index="1">Bit</span>
      </th>
      <th style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; border-bottom: 2px solid #cbd5e1; background-color: #e2e8f0;"></th>
      <th style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; border-bottom: 2px solid #cbd5e1; text-align: center; background-color: #e2e8f0; color: #1e293b; font-weight: 600;">
        <span class="fragment highlight-blue" data-fragment-index="2">Qubit</span>
      </th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; text-align: center; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #334155; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
        <div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index="1">$$0$$</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; text-align: center; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #334155; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
        <div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index="2">$$\longrightarrow$$</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; text-align: center; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #334155; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
        <div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index="2">$$|0\rangle$$</div>
      </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; text-align: center; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #334155;">
        <div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index="1">$$1$$</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; text-align: center; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #334155;">
        <div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index="2">$$\longrightarrow$$</div>
      </td>
      <td style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; text-align: center; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #334155;">
        <div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index="2">$$|1\rangle$$</div>
      </td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
</div>

::: 

::: {.column width="50%"}

Karena Qubit bersifat
<span class="fragment highlight-blue" data-fragment-index="1"><strong>Kuantum</strong></span>,
, maka Qubit dapat mengalami
<span class="fragment highlight-red" data-fragment-index="2"><strong>Superposisi</strong></span>.
<table style="margin: 2em auto; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 0.8em; width: 90%; table-layout: fixed; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <!-- Judul Kolom Kiri -->
      <th style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; border-bottom: 2px solid #cbd5e1; text-align: left; width: 40%; background-color: #e2e8f0; color: #1e293b;">
        <span class="fragment highlight-blue" data-fragment-index="1" style="font-weight: 600; display: block;">Sifat Bit</span>
      </th>
      <!-- Kolom Kosong Untuk Panah -->
      <th style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; border-bottom: 2px solid #cbd5e1; width: 20%; background-color: #e2e8f0;"></th>
      <!-- Judul Kolom Kanan -->
      <th style="padding: 0.8em 1.2em; border-bottom: 2px solid #cbd5e1; text-align: left; width: 40%; background-color: #e2e8f0; color: #1e293b;">
        <span class="fragment highlight-red" data-fragment-index="2" style="font-weight: 600; display: block;">Sifat Qubit</span>
      </th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <!-- Isi Kolom Kiri -->
      <td style="padding: 1em 1.2em; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #334155; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
        <div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index="1">0 atau 1</div>
      </td>
      <!-- Isi Kolom Tengah (Panah) -->
      <td style="padding: 1em 1.2em; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #334155; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
        <div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index="2">$$\longrightarrow$$</div>
      </td>
      <!-- Isi Kolom Kanan -->
      <td style="padding: 1em 1.2em; text-align: left; vertical-align: middle; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #334155; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
        <div class="fragment fade-in" data-fragment-index="2">$$|\psi\rangle = \alpha|0\rangle + \beta|1\rangle$$</div>
      </td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

::: 

:::: 

---


## Representasi Standard Qubit 

:::: {.columns style="display: flex; gap: 4%; margin-top: 1.5em; text-align: left;"}

::: {.column width="48%" .fragment}
**Vektor Kolom**

$$|0\rangle = \begin{pmatrix} 1 \\ 0 \end{pmatrix}, \quad |1\rangle = \begin{pmatrix} 0 \\ 1 \end{pmatrix}$$

$$\begin{aligned}
|\psi\rangle &= \alpha|0\rangle + \beta|1\rangle \\
             &= \alpha \begin{pmatrix} 1 \\ 0 \end{pmatrix}
              + \beta \begin{pmatrix} 0 \\ 1 \end{pmatrix}
              = \begin{pmatrix} \alpha \\ \beta \end{pmatrix}
\end{aligned}$$
:::

::: {.column width="48%" style="border-left: 1px solid #ffffff; padding-left: 4%;" .fragment}
**Syarat Normalisasi**

$$\langle\psi| = \begin{pmatrix} \alpha^* & \beta^* \end{pmatrix}$$

$$\begin{aligned}
\langle\psi|\psi\rangle
  &= \begin{pmatrix} \alpha^* & \beta^* \end{pmatrix}
     \begin{pmatrix} \alpha \\ \beta \end{pmatrix} = 1 \\
  &= \alpha^*\alpha + \beta^*\beta = 1 \\
  &= |\alpha|^2 + |\beta|^2 = 1
\end{aligned}$$
:::

::::

**Bentuk Fisis Bit dan Qubit**

<div style="display: flex; flex-direction: row; justify-content: center; gap: 2rem; text-align: center; align-items: flex-start;">

<div class="fragment" style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:1rem;">
  <div style="width:100px; text-align:right; font-weight:bold;">
    Bit
  </div>

  <img src="gambar/2.png"
       class="img-border"
       style="width:360px; height:auto;">
</div>

<div class="fragment" style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:1rem;">
  <div style="width:100px; text-align:right; font-weight:bold;">
    Qubit
  </div>

  <img src="gambar/1.png"
       class="img-border"
       style="width:360px; height:auto;">
</div>

</div>


---

## Transisi Keadaan Sistem 2-Qubit dan 3-Qubit

Bagaimana untuk sistem 2 Bit dan 3 Bit?

::: {.columns .fragment}

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Sistem 2-Bit Klasik
  $$\{00, 01, 10, 11\}$$
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Sistem 2-Qubit Kuantum
- Basis keadaannya dilambangkan dengan ket biner:
  $$|00\rangle, |01\rangle, |10\rangle, |11\rangle$$

:::{.fragment}
$$|\psi\rangle = c_{00}|00\rangle + c_{01}|01\rangle + c_{10}|10\rangle + c_{11}|11\rangle$$
:::

:::

:::

::: {.columns .fragment}

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Sistem 3-Bit Klasik
  $$\{000, 001, 010, 011, 100, 101, 110, 111\}$$
  <!-- [$M=SU(8)$]{.fragment .strike} -->
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
### Sistem 3-Qubit Kuantum
- Basis keadaannya dilambangkan dengan ket biner:
$$|000\rangle, |001\rangle, |010\rangle, |011\rangle$$
$$|100\rangle,|101\rangle,|110\rangle,|111\rangle$$

:::{.fragment}
$${|\psi\rangle = c_{000}|000\rangle + c_{001}|001\rangle + \dots + c_{111}|111\rangle}$$
:::

:::

:::
